textEn: and by the night when it covers with darkness,
your Lord has neither forsaken you [O Prophet] nor hated you;
textTranslit: Ma wad da'aka rabbuka wa ma qalaa

textEn: the Hereafter is better for you than the present life;
and your Lord will certainly give you so much that you will be well pleased.
textTranslit: Wa la sawfa y'uteeka rabbuka fatarda

textEn: Did He not find you an orphan then take good care of you?
textTranslit: Alam ya jidka yateeman fa aawaa

textEn: Did He not find you unguided then guide you?
textTranslit: Wa wa jadaka daal lan fahada

textEn: Did He not find you in need then enrich you?
So do not mistreat the orphan,
textTranslit: Fa am mal yateema fala taqhar
Wa am mas saa-ila fala tanhar

textEn: and proclaim the favors of your Lord.
textTranslit: Wa amma bi ni'mati rabbika fahad dith
